title: mikeljc-dev/docsera
summary: AI chat widget for your docs — open source, self-hosted, privacy-first. RAG with citations. Works with Anthropic, OpenAI or local models via Ollama.

title: 0HenrikAndersson0/foreman
summary: 👷 Foreman: Cloud Architect + Ollama Coder Orchestrator Foreman is a local-first, interactive Terminal User Interface (TUI) orchestrator that bridges Cloud Architect Agents (like Google Antigravity CLI, Anthropic's Claude Code, or GitHub Copilot) with local Ollama models (low-level code generation and execution).

title: famclaw/famclaw
summary: Self-hosted family AI gateway with parental controls. Runs on Linux, macOS, and Android (Termux) — Raspberry Pi, mini PC, old laptop, homelab server, even a phone. Telegram, Discord, web. Privacy-first, works with any LLM (local or cloud), OPA content filtering, MCP skill scanning.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.

title: Emanuele-Chiummo/llm-wiki-synapse
summary: Self-hosted AI wiki that organizes itself — LLM ingest, knowledge graph, cited chat, Obsidian-compatible vault. FastAPI + React + Tauri.

title: loblawbob873-svg/posterchanai
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: EthanYoQ/AI-Novel-Writer
summary: 本地写小说软件与 AI 网文写作工具：支持大纲、角色关系图谱、章节蓝图、审稿修稿和知识库的中文小说创作软件。解决AI写小说角色混乱，长期遗忘的问题。

title: 0xra0/bethesda-strings-editor
summary: PySide6 translation editor for Bethesda Starfield — edits .strings/.dlstrings/.ilstrings, BA2 archives and ESP/ESM plugins with Ollama or Claude AI backends, QC checks, translation memory, glossary, and NexusMods integration

title: kalinbogatzevski/captain-memo
summary: Local, cross-AI memory for coding agents — Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Antigravity, Cursor, Kimi & more share one private corpus. Hybrid search, auto-injected context, no-API-key summarizers, runs fully local via Ollama.

title: LucidPrinciples/lucid-cove
summary: A private, self-hosted home for your family and its intelligence. Named agents with memory and daily practice — your data, your models, your machine.

title: jellologic/swisscode
summary: Drop-in launcher for Claude Code, Kilo & OpenCode — point any coding CLI at Ollama (local, no key), OpenRouter, z.ai/GLM, Kimi, DeepSeek, Qwen, ModelScope & more. Named profiles, per-directory bindings, real 1M-context fixes, a preflight doctor. No proxy, no daemon, no shell aliases.

title: VyomKulshrestha/Heliox-OS
summary: An open-source, privacy-first AI System Control Agent (JARVIS-like) using voice and hand gestures

title: brandonkindred/Khala-Agentic-AI-Teams
summary: Many Agents, one objective... yours

title: orkun-soylu/calivi
summary: Self-hosted chat UI for Ollama & OpenAI-compatible servers — you pick which model runs where.

title: lidge-jun/opencodex
summary: Universal provider proxy for OpenAI Codex & Claude Code — use any LLM (Claude, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Ollama…) with Codex CLI, App, SDK, and Claude Code

title: sivabalaji1986/agentic-chargeback-investigator
summary: Multi-agent AI chargeback investigation platform: A2A, MCP, RAG, AG-UI, A2UI, dynamic agent discovery, human-in-the-loop.

title: krishddd/llm-wiki
summary: LLM-powered Wikipedia knowledge agent — MCP integration, Ollama/OpenAI support, semantic search, streaming answers with cited sources

title: RunAnyDev/runany
summary: Open-source Astro MDX tech blog for AI setup guides, local LLMs, Ollama, developer tools, self-hosted tutorials, and automation workflows

title: Aaris-Kazi/SynapseAI-UI
summary: UI for the in house LLM

title: pipeshub-ai/pipeshub-ai
summary: PipesHub is an open-source fully extensible AI context layer that unifies your business data for explainable enterprise search and agentic workflow automation.
